name: Chili Mac'n Cheddar
recipeIngredient: 1 can Diced green chilies or Jalapeno peppers, drained (4 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare CREAMETTES Elbow Macaroni according to package directions; drain.
2. In a large skillet, combine chili, tomatoes with juice, and green chilies; mix well.
3. Simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in cooked macaroni and sprinkle cheese over the top.
5. Cover and simmer until the cheese melts, about 5 minutes.
6. Serve with sour cream and corn chips. Refrigerate leftovers. Makes 6-8 servings.
